prompt: I'm setting up nf-test for the first time in my Nextflow project. Walk me through: (1) initializing nf-test, (2) what goes in nf-test.config, (3) how to structure the tests/ directory, and (4) how to configure a tests/nextflow.config to limit CPU/memory during tests. Give me concrete examples of each.

assertions.text: Shows nf-test.config with at least testsDir, workDir, configFile, and profile settings
Describes tests/ directory structure with example layout
Shows tests/nextflow.config with process resource overrides (cpus, memory)
All four requested topics (init, config, structure, resource limits) are addressed
